Building clear, reliable products for real users.

I focus on practical software engineering: shipping maintainable web apps, improving performance, and turning ambiguous requirements into concrete outcomes.

At a glance

  • 3+ years of tutoring and mentoring experience
  • Hands-on projects in full-stack web development
  • Strong fundamentals in algorithms, systems, and data

About

I am a Computer Science and Mathematics student at the University of British Columbia. I enjoy working across product and engineering boundaries, especially when a project requires both technical depth and clear communication.

My recent work spans full-stack web apps, AI-assisted note processing, and data-oriented tooling. I value strong code organization, measurable impact, and fast iteration cycles.

Featured Projects

Three projects that highlight product thinking, implementation quality, and impact.

Experience

Concise outcomes and responsibilities across tutoring, research, and service roles.

Skills

Organized by what I use to build and ship software.

Contact

If you are hiring for an internship or collaboration, send a message through the form or contact me directly.

  • Email: hello@sungjunlee.dev
  • GitHub: github.com/anderpudding
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/sungjunlee

If the form is unavailable, email me directly and include "Portfolio" in the subject.
